name: Security - Azure AI Search Credentials Validation
description: Ensures AzureAISearchClient.get_client raises ValueError if any credential is missing.
input: Call AzureAISearchClient.get_client() with missing endpoint, index name, or API key.
output: ValueError is raised indicating incomplete credentials.
success_criteria: Error message contains 'Azure AI Search credentials are not fully configured.'
error_scenarios: No error raised when credentials are missing
